channel.title: Journo Pulse – U.S. Breaking News, politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights.

item.title: Puerto Rico Governor Signs Bill Critics Say Will Restrict Access to Public Information
item.description:
Puerto Rico's governor has signed a controversial bill that critics argue will restrict public access to government information, sparking concern among journalists and watchdog groups.

Read the full article: Puerto Rico Governor Public Information Bill
item.author: admin@journopulse.com (Journo Pulse)

item.title: Supreme Court to Hear Oil Firms’ Appeals in Climate Lawsuits
item.description:
The U.S. Supreme Court has agreed to hear appeals from oil and gas companies attempting to block lawsuits seeking to hold the industry liable for billions of dollars in damages linked to climate change.

Read the full article: Full Article
item.author: admin@journopulse.com (Journo Pulse)
